title: Snake Game
description: Play the classic Snake game online for free. Guide the snake to eat food and grow without hitting walls or yourself. Runs in your browser.
hint: Arrow keys or WASD · Swipe on mobile

howToUse.label: Start
howToUse.description: Click Start or press any arrow key to begin. The snake moves automatically.

howToUse.label: Control
howToUse.description: Use arrow keys (↑↓←→) or WASD on desktop, or swipe on mobile to change direction.

howToUse.label: Eat food
howToUse.description: Guide the snake to the red food dot. Each piece eaten grows the snake and increases your score.

howToUse.label: Avoid collisions
howToUse.description: Don't hit the walls or the snake's own body. The game ends immediately on collision.

faq.question: How do I control the snake?
faq.answer: Use arrow keys or WASD on a keyboard. On mobile, swipe in the direction you want the snake to turn.

faq.question: Is my best score saved?
faq.answer: Yes. Your best score is saved in your browser's local storage and persists between sessions.

faq.question: Does the snake speed up?
faq.answer: The speed stays constant at the current difficulty. Focus on precision rather than speed.

faq.question: What happens when I hit a wall?
faq.answer: The game ends immediately. Click 'Try Again' to start a new game with a fresh board.

faq.question: Can I pause the game?
faq.answer: Yes. Click the Pause button or press the spacebar to pause and resume.
